brand_direction: Earthy luxury (obsidian + sage/copper accents) AND Modern Web3 (near-black + electric cyan/lime accents)

visual_enhancers.noise: Add a subtle CSS noise overlay to backgrounds to kill digital flatness and enhance the cinematic feel.
visual_enhancers.glow: Use drop-shadows with cyan/lime for active Web3 states, e.g., drop-shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(0,229,255,0.3)].
visual_enhancers.gradients: Avoid generic fullscreen gradients. Use localized radial glows (blur-3xl opacity-20) behind key components like the BCD token visual.

layout_and_spacing.generous_spacing: Use py-24 to py-32 for section padding to give cinematic breathing room.
layout_and_spacing.grids: Use Mode A (Tetris Grid) for visual sections, and asymmetric overlapping layouts for storytelling. Never fill 100% of the grid perfectly.
layout_and_spacing.containers: Use max-w-7xl mx-auto for content framing, but allow hero images to break out full-width (w-full).

motion_and_interactions.scrolling: Implement React Lenis for momentum-based smooth scrolling to give the site a premium weight.
motion_and_interactions.reveals: Use Framer Motion staggered Y-axis reveals (initial={opacity: 0, y: 30}) for text blocks.
motion_and_interactions.parallax: Apply subtle y-axis transforms on scroll to hero and section background images.
motion_and_interactions.hover: Scale up images slightly (scale-105) and increase glass border opacity or glow on hover.

components_and_tech.icons: Use lucide-react (default). For technical flow diagrams, ensure line weights are consistent (e.g., 1.5px).
components_and_tech.ui_components: Use custom raw HTML/Tailwind for marketing layout flexibility (avoid rigid Shadcn cards). Use Shadcn only for complex logic like Waitlist Input, Form, and Dialogs.
components_and_tech.buttons: Primary CTA: Copper or Cyan background with dark text, scale-105 on hover. Secondary CTA: Outline border-white/20 hover:border-cyan-400 text-white.

hero_transformation.description: Hero Section: Beautiful community space transformation.

problem_timeline.description: The Problem Section: Abandoned building timeline visual.

impact_gallery.description: Real World Impact Section: Thriving community at dusk.

investor_abstract.description: For Investors Section: Abstract web3 architecture representing digital physical integration.

instructions_to_main_agent.general: Build a single-page React app (marketing landing page) using a cinematic, scroll-driven narrative. Mix Earthy Luxury (copper, sage, architectural photography) with Web3 (cyan/lime glow, glass nodes).
instructions_to_main_agent.section_1_hero: Fullscreen height (min-h-screen). Absolute positioning for 'hero_transformation' with a dark overlay (bg-black/40 to bg-black/60) to ensure text legibility. Large heading 'We Bring Places Back To Life.' Two CTAs.
instructions_to_main_agent.section_2_problem: Create a vertical layout with an interactive timeline line. Use 'problem_timeline' image as a sticky side visual or a parallax backdrop for the text.
instructions_to_main_agent.section_3_vision: Focus on minimal, massive typography (Cabinet Grotesk). Center the narrative.
instructions_to_main_agent.section_4_ecosystem: Create a CSS/Framer Motion 'network' of 7 cards using glassmorphism. Add 'Beta' badges (JetBrains Mono, text-xs, border border-cyan-400 text-cyan-400 rounded-full px-2) to the links. Treat external links as target='_blank'.
instructions_to_main_agent.section_5_culture_layer: Design a 5-step flow diagram with arrows: Identity -> Community -> Property -> Investment -> Reward. Use Lucide icons and glowing cyan accent lines between steps.
instructions_to_main_agent.section_6_bcd: Center a bold visual element representing the BCD Token. Use CSS radial-gradient to make it glow from behind. Surround with orbiting or connected UI nodes.
instructions_to_main_agent.section_7_impact: Bento grid or asymmetrical layout using 'impact_gallery' image to ground the digital ecosystem in reality.
instructions_to_main_agent.section_8_investor: Side-by-side or overlapping block layout using 'investor_abstract' image. Convey a highly premium, institutional feel.
instructions_to_main_agent.section_9_future: Vertical roadmap timeline with Shipped vs Upcoming distinct states (muted vs bright).
instructions_to_main_agent.section_10_footer: Final Waitlist capture. Use Shadcn Input and Button for email submission. Large 'Let's Talk' or final statement. Ensure the form is mocked to show success state on submit.
instructions_to_main_agent.testing: MUST include data-testid on all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, links). Use descriptive IDs like data-testid='hero-cta-explore'.
